title: PULSE User Configuration
description: Defines the user's effort set, context batches, and optional codebase registry for /dispatch.

efforts.description: List of user effort definitions. Each effort maps to one Map file in pulse-vault/Maps/.

slug.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. Used in Note frontmatter, skill arguments, and Map filenames.

not.description: 'pulse' is reserved for the engine's system Map. Use a different slug.

batch.description: Context batch this effort belongs to. Must match a batch name in the 'batches' array, or one of the default batches: Work, Projects, Maintenance, Leisure.

base_priority.description: Life-importance anchor (1=lowest, 10=highest). Changes rarely — only when life circumstances shift. This seeds the priority formula but does not determine final ranking.

purpose.description: One-sentence description of what this effort is about. Used by the agent for /triage classification and /focus context loading.

aliases.description: Alternative names for this effort. Used by /focus for flexible slug matching.

batches.description: Optional. Override or extend the default batch set. Default batches: Work, Projects, Maintenance, Leisure.

name.description: Unique batch name. Referenced by effort 'batch' field.

shared_context.description: The shared problem domain — tools, environment, stakeholders. Primary grouping signal (domain switching is expensive).

mindset.description: The cognitive mode for this batch. Secondary grouping signal.

codebase_registry.description: Optional. Maps effort slugs (or project names) to their local codebase directories. Used by /dispatch to set up git worktrees for sub-agents.

name.description: Effort slug or project name. Matched against the /dispatch argument.

path.description: Absolute path to the project directory on this machine.
